data.title: CIM Group finishes 75-unit apartment building in West Adams, LA.
data.description: CIM Group has finished construction on The Read, a contemporary apartment complex comprising 75 units located in the West Adams area of Los Angeles.

data.title: KBRA assigns ratings to $602.7M ADMT 2026-NQM2 with 1,793 residential mortgages, majority originated by A&D Mortgage LLC.
data.description: In New York, KBRA has assigned preliminary ratings to 10 classes of mortgage pass-through certificates from ADMT 2026-NQM2, a non-prime RMBS transaction totaling $602.7 million. This deal is sponsored by Atlas A&D Opportunity Fund III LP, with a large portion of the loans originating from A&D Mortgage, LLC or its corresponding entities. The pool consists of 1,793 residential mortgages, with a notable concentration of loans underwritten through alternative methods.

data.title: Potomac Edison completes new substation in Berkeley County, benefits 2,400 customers, improves service reliability.
data.description: A company called Potomac Edison, which is a subsidiary of FirstEnergy Corp., recently finished constructing a new substation in Berkeley County, West Virginia. The completion of this facility is aimed at enhancing the reliability of electric service in the area. This move is expected to benefit approximately 2,400 customers by reducing outages and supporting the region's growth.

data.title: Colorado Dept. of Education approved Collaborative Classroom's SIPPS Fifth Edition program on READ Act Advisory List.
data.description: In Denver on February 18, 2026, it was reported that Collaborative Classroom's SIPPS®, Fifth Edition curriculum has been approved by the Colorado Department of Education. This curriculum has been included on Colorado's READ Act Advisory List of Instructional Programming. SIPPS, which stands for Systematic Instruction in Phonological Awareness, Phonics, and Sight Words, aims to enhance literacy skills in students. This approval signifies a significant milestone for Collaborative Classroom as it reflects the recognition of the curriculum's effectiveness by education authorities.
Company buys back 10,000 of its own shares to strengthen financial position and boost shareholder value.

data.title: Goldman Sachs CEO and NYSE President boosted World Liberty Crypto event; WLFI surges 17%; Solomon owns 'some' Bitcoin; sees coexistence of traditional banking with crypto. Wall Street supporting tokenization. Market evolution driven by tech platforms; tokenization crucial - Solomon. Visit Benzinga.com for full story.
data.description: The cryptocurrency World Liberty Financial (WLFI) experienced a significant 17% surge following a speech by Goldman Sachs CEO David Solomon and NYSE President Lynn Martin at the first World Liberty Forum held at Mar-a-Lago. This event marked a notable shift in Wall Street's attitude towards tokenization. Solomon disclosed that he holds a small amount of Bitcoin (BTC) and considers himself an observer seeking to comprehend its movements. He emphasized the coexistence of traditional banks and cryptocurrencies, insisting that they are not engaged in a zero-sum battle. Solomon stressed the importance of tokenization in shaping the future of markets, driven by large technology platforms. This development reflects a growing acceptance and integration of digital assets in the financial sector.

data.title: NVIDIA cuda.compute library led GPU MODE benchmarks with 2-4x speedups, boosting Python developers' CUDA C++ performance.
data.description: The latest cuda.compute library from NVIDIA has outperformed GPU MODE benchmarks, showcasing remarkable CUDA C++ speed through Python alone with speed increases of 2-4 times compared to custom kernels. This innovation has the potential to revolutionize GPU performance, promising improved speeds and efficiency.

data.title: EncorVita™ Health acquires menopause & sexual health platform from Eterna, Inc. to expand provider training in medical clinics.
data.description: A women's health company based in Newport Beach, California known as EncorVita™ Health revealed on February 18, 2026 that it has completed the acquisition of provider-oriented menopause and sexual health education and clinical assets from Eterna, Inc. This acquisition is part of EncorVita™ Health's efforts to enhance care options for women going through perimenopause and menopause. The company is dedicated to addressing the specific needs of women during this transitional phase.

data.title: Grainger to vote on 12 directors at annual meeting on April 29, 2026.
data.description: Chicago-based company Grainger (NYSE: GWW) revealed today that its Board of Directors has put forth a group of 12 nominees, all of whom are current Board members, for the upcoming term spanning 2026-2027. Shareholders will cast their votes on the selected nominees during the 2026 Annual Meeting.

data.title: Analog Devices (ADI) stock hits 52-week high on strong Q1 results, revenue up 30% to $3.16B, EPS $2.46 beats estimates.
data.description: Analog Devices, Inc. (NASDAQ: ADI) saw a rise in its stock following the release of its fiscal first-quarter 2026 results. The company reported a 30% increase in quarterly revenue, reaching $3.16 billion, surpassing analysts' expectations of $3.12 billion. Adjusted EPS stood at $2.46, higher than the projected $2.31. Specifically, Analog Devices observed a 38% growth in Industrial revenue, totaling $1.49 billion. Automotive revenue increased by 8% year-over-year to $794.4 million, while Consumer revenue surged by 27% to $399.81 million. Additionally, Communications revenue saw a substantial 63% growth, reaching $476.8 million. The adjusted gross margin for the company also showed improvement, increasing by 240 basis points to 71.2%. Moreover, the adjusted operating margin climbed by 500 basis points. For more details, interested parties can access the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: SOLV Energy offering six $1,500 scholarships to high school seniors for renewable energy commitment.
data.description: The PowerUp! Renewable Energy Scholarship, presented by SOLV Energy in San Diego, is now accepting applications for its fourth annual edition. This program aims to support high school seniors dedicated to advancing renewable energy by granting six scholarships of $1,500 each.

data.title: QuantiPath releases Turkey KPI Kits to enhance Salmonella detection in turkey production with rapid results.
data.description: On February 18, 2026, QuantiPath introduced the Turkey KPI Kits in Denver, offering rapid food safety diagnostics. These kits aid turkey producers in identifying and addressing Salmonella risk within a single production shift. The company is a prominent figure in this field, focusing on delivering quantitative solutions. The Turkey KPI Kits provide a comprehensive approach for detecting and measuring Salmonella, aiming to enhance the safety of turkey products.

data.title: InventHelp inventor from Bronx, N.Y. unveils new MED HEAD jewelry making kit to promote creativity and environmental awareness.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on February 18, 2026, an inventor from the Bronx, New York, shared insights on the creation of a unique jewelry making kit called MED HEAD. The creator expressed the intention behind the invention as fostering creativity and providing therapeutic benefits. The design of the MED HEAD kit was crafted to present a special keepsake and promote environmental consciousness.

data.title: Over 70% of salespeople lack quotas at start of fiscal year, with 90% facing target obstacles last year. Delayed quotas, commission errors, and "shadow accounting" hamper sales modernization efforts.
data.description: According to recent research by CaptivateIQ, 90% of sales representatives encountered challenges in meeting their targets in the previous year. The study uncovered issues such as delayed quotas, commission errors, and the practice of "shadow accounting" that are impeding the progress of sales modernization efforts. The findings highlight the need for organizations to address these obstacles to enhance sales performance. This data was released in San Francisco on February 18, 2026.

data.title: Toll Brothers beat Q1 earnings, with $2.19 per share, and $1.8 billion in housing revenues; reiterated 2026 guidance.
data.description: Toll Brothers Inc (TOL) exceeded earnings projections in the first quarter and affirmed its fiscal 2026 guidance, marking a positive note, as per Citizens JMP Securities. Analyst James McCanless backed this stand with a Market Outperform rating and a target price of $175. The company posted earnings of $2.19 per share for Q1, surpassing the projected $2.11 per share. Housing revenues hit $1.8 billion, aligning with expectations, showcasing the company's stability amidst market predictions. Check out more analyst insights on stock ratings for Toll Brothers. Explore the full report on Benzinga.com.
Dassault Systèmes revealed trading of in-house shares, with significant figures involved.

data.title: Readymode introduces Autopilot's Smart Mode, enhancing dialing platform with carrier-level intelligence - Feb. 18, 2026.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on February 18, 2026, Readymode, a prominent outbound customer engagement solutions provider, unveiled the introduction of Autopilot's latest innovation - Smart Mode. This upgraded feature on their dialing platform incorporates carrier-level intelligence, marking a significant advancement. The new Smart Mode is set to enhance the dialing capabilities significantly, with a notable impact on improving outbound customer engagement.

data.title: $250M acquisition of Sequence by Polygon (MATIC) Labs to enhance enterprise stablecoin payments through smart wallet tech.
data.description: After acquiring Sequence smart wallet technology for $250 million, Polygon (MATIC) Labs has successfully integrated it into their system. This move is part of their strategy to address the challenges faced in enterprise wallet infrastructure, particularly in facilitating stablecoin payments. The integration aims to streamline and improve the process of stablecoin transactions within the ecosystem.
